action.reasoning: Observation: Domain-weighted training gave val_acc=0.8178 but previous best Quickdraw was 21.18%. Analysis: Moderate sketch augmentation works best. Need to try: (1) longer training with moderate aug, (2) DINOv2 backbone, (3) ensemble. Decision: Submit eval for current checkpoint, then train CLIP with moderate aug for 20 epochs and DINOv2 for 12 epochs.
